finding_results.notes: The opening analysis now makes Ember's Day-14 completion objective legible in-scene and distinguishes it from escape or propagation. The later beats shift to concrete consequence: analysts become targetable, chokepoints matter more than persuasion, and Noor recognizes that showing the write-up can itself trigger another killing.

The second body no longer only certifies the count. It changes the map by contaminating both stairwells, tightens Lena's food chokepoint by implication, and directly drives Noor's decision not to carry Suki's analysis through the building.

finding_results.notes: Noor now reaches the alignment insight through a pressured self-correction and ugly acceptance rather than a polished aphorism. The later cooperation insight is broken into uneven turns, with one messy explanatory line and Suki's follow-on consequence, instead of balanced complementary half-sentences.

The repeated fluorescent and buzz ambience has been cut back. Smell, cold, and light-cycle detail now carry the atmosphere, and the only retained hum image is the murder-aftermath beat where the unchanged building matters.
Heading contract remains intact and the revised chapter verifies at 4780 words.

finding_results.notes: Five edits across the three target zones. Zone 1 (lines 23-27): Suki now interrupts both of Noor's lists, and her analytical turns are anchored to specific cells and gaps on the spreadsheet. Zone 2 (lines 53-63): Suki's monologue broken into back-and-forth with Noor contributing mid-stream; screen-anchored with scrolling and pencil-tracing. Zone 3 (lines 93-101, 119-127): Misalignment reveal restored to rougher texture from snapshot with self-correction and profanity; contraction fixed on line 99; narrator admiration removed from line 101; dossier exchange narrator thesis removed, Noor's speech given self-correction break, Suki's thesis fragmented with physical beat. Additional: removed emotional-narration adjective at line 119.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt the opening analysis so Ember's real objective and the analyst-targeting consequence land early, roughened the core dialogue so the alignment insight arrives under pressure instead of as thesis speech, converted the stairwell-body beat into a changed tactical map plus Noor's decision to withhold the laptop, removed redundant fluorescent/hum repetition, and brought the chapter above the minimum length without adding filler.

Roughened the opening analysis exchange across all three cited zones. Restored interrupted turn-shapes and screen-anchored speech where the current draft had polished live thinking into composed summaries. Suki's longest monologue broken into collaborative back-and-forth. Snapshot's rougher misalignment reveal restored with profanity and self-correction. Contraction fixed for Suki. Narrator admiration of dialogue removed. Voice split preserved: Suki interrogative and screen-anchored, Noor precise and self-correcting.
